CVE-2022-35133.title: A cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in CherryTree v0.99.30 ...
CVE-2022-35133.description: A cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in CherryTree v0.99.30 allows attackers to execute arbitrary web scripts or HTML via a crafted payload injected into the Name text field when creating a node.
